inferred_style: Schema-first PHP library with layered code generation, lazy PSR-container runtime wiring, and example-driven execution flow.

layers.name: SDL input
layers.responsibility: Defines GraphQL types, directives, scalars, and federation-related SDL consumed by generation and demo runtime.

layers.name: Schema composition and federation extension
layers.responsibility: Builds Schema objects from SDL and optionally injects federation directives, aliases, and support types.

layers.name: Generator builder layer
layers.responsibility: Composes concrete model generators, TypeRegistry generators, resolver providers, and optional federation/AMPHP variants.

layers.name: Model and artifact generation
layers.responsibility: Emits PHP files for models, resolvers, directive args, scalar resolvers, and generated runtime artifacts.

layers.name: Lazy runtime registry generation
layers.responsibility: Generates a lazy TypeRegistry whose closures resolve services from a PSR container and can wrap resolvers with directives or async adapters.

layers.name: Example runtime and tests
layers.responsibility: Instantiates the generated TypeRegistry and a demo container to run HTTP and direct execution examples.

path_mappings.reason: SDL drives generated example artifacts and runtime execution behavior.

di_service_wiring_model.style: PSR container injection into generated TypeRegistry
details: Generated TypeRegistry classes accept ContainerInterface in the constructor.
Resolver provider classes emit closures that call $this->container->get(...) using generated service names.
Example runtime wires concrete resolver, directive, scalar, and representation instances in PsrContainerExample.

config_model.style: Root manifest plus PSR4 codegen config classes
details: composer.json defines package metadata, runtime dependencies, and autoload roots.
phpunit.xml.dist defines bootstrap and suite roots.
src/Generator/Config/Foundation/Psr4/*.php determine output class names, namespaces, and directories.

cross_module_relationships.relationship: SchemaBuilder and federation extenders produce Schema objects consumed by builder-created generators.
CodeGeneratorBuilder instantiates model and resolver generators.
TypeRegistryGeneratorBuilder composes resolver providers and TypeRegistry generation.
Generated object model overwrite behavior depends on AutoGenerationInterface and typed scalar contracts.
The example runtime and execution tests instantiate generated TypeRegistry code.

integration_boundaries.name: webonyx/graphql-php
integration_boundaries.role: Schema, server, execution, directive, and type definitions

integration_boundaries.name: nikic/php-parser
integration_boundaries.role: Preserves user-edited object models by parsing existing files before regeneration.

integration_boundaries.name: psr/container
integration_boundaries.role: Abstracts service lookup for generated runtime closures in examples and tests.
